title: Marcus and the Lonely Lion Cub
synopsis: When Marcus visits the zoo with his family, he discovers a sad lion cub who has lost his favorite toy. Through kindness and bravery, Marcus helps his new friend feel happy again, learning that helping others makes us feel good too.

chapters.title: A Sad Lion at the Zoo

pages.text: Marcus loved going to the zoo! He held his mama's hand tight as they walked past the colorful birds and tall giraffes. Marcus had beautiful dark skin like his mama and wore his favorite red shirt with a dinosaur on it. He felt so happy and excited!

illustration.description: A young Black boy with short curly hair wearing a bright red dinosaur t-shirt and blue shorts, holding hands with his mother who has long braided hair and wears a yellow sundress. They're walking on a sunny zoo path with colorful parrots in trees and a giraffe visible in the background. The scene uses bright primary colors with a cheerful cartoon style and slightly textured background like construction paper.
illustration.alt: Marcus, a young Black boy, walks happily through the zoo with his mother

pages.text: When they reached the lion area, Marcus saw something that made him feel worried. A little lion cub sat all alone in the corner. The cub's golden fur looked messy, and big tears rolled down his furry cheeks. "Why is the baby lion so sad?" Marcus asked his mama.

illustration.description: A small golden lion cub sitting sadly in the corner of his enclosure, with tears visible on his face and messy fur. Marcus and his mother stand at the fence looking concerned. The lion area has sandy ground and some rocks, with warm yellow and orange tones. The cub's expression shows clear sadness while Marcus looks worried and empathetic.
illustration.alt: A sad lion cub sits alone while Marcus and his mother watch with concern

pages.text: Marcus's mama knelt down beside him. "Let's ask the zookeeper," she said gently. A kind zookeeper named Ms. Rosa walked over. She had warm brown skin and wore a khaki uniform. "Little Leo lost his favorite stuffed elephant yesterday," she explained. "He's been scared and lonely without it."

illustration.description: Ms. Rosa, a Latina zookeeper with shoulder-length dark hair and kind brown eyes, wearing a tan uniform and sun hat, kneels between Marcus and his mother near the lion enclosure. She has a gentle, caring expression as she explains about Leo. The background shows the zoo setting with green foliage and the lion enclosure fence.
illustration.alt: Ms. Rosa the zookeeper explains to Marcus and his mother about the sad lion cub

pages.text: Marcus felt sad for little Leo. He looked at his own stuffed elephant that he brought to the zoo. It was gray and soft and made Marcus feel safe. "Can I give my elephant to Leo?" Marcus asked. His mama smiled proudly. "That's very brave and kind of you, Marcus."

illustration.description: Marcus holds up his small gray stuffed elephant toy, looking determined and caring. His mother beams with pride beside him, her hand gently on his shoulder. Ms. Rosa looks pleased and surprised by his kindness. The scene shows warm, encouraging expressions and bright colors with a golden afternoon light filtering through the scene.
illustration.alt: Marcus bravely offers his stuffed elephant to help the sad lion cub

pages.text: Ms. Rosa helped Marcus give his stuffed elephant to Leo. The little lion cub's eyes grew wide and bright! He hugged the soft gray elephant tight and made happy purring sounds. Leo wasn't scared anymore - he felt safe and loved. Marcus felt wonderful inside, warm and happy like sunshine.

illustration.description: Leo the lion cub joyfully hugging Marcus's gray stuffed elephant, with a huge smile and bright, happy eyes. His golden fur looks fluffy and well-groomed now. Marcus beams with joy watching through the fence, his face glowing with happiness. Ms. Rosa and Marcus's mother smile warmly in the background. The scene radiates warmth and joy with golden and bright colors.
illustration.alt: Leo the lion cub happily hugs the stuffed elephant while Marcus watches with joy

pages.text: As they walked home, Marcus felt proud and happy. "You helped Leo feel better," his mama said, giving him a big hug. "When we're kind to others, it makes our hearts feel good too." Marcus smiled big. He couldn't wait to visit his new friend Leo again tomorrow!

illustration.description: Marcus walks hand-in-hand with his mother toward the zoo exit, both with huge smiles. The sun is setting with warm orange and pink colors in the sky. Through the fence in the background, Leo can be seen playing happily with the stuffed elephant. Marcus looks proud and content, his mother looks lovingly down at him. The scene has a warm, golden glow and peaceful, happy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Marcus and his mother walk happily toward home as the sun sets, with Leo playing contentedly in the background

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Leo the lion cub feel at the beginning?
questions.explanation: Leo felt sad and scared because he lost his favorite stuffed elephant and was lonely.

questions.question: What did Marcus give to Leo?
questions.explanation: Marcus kindly gave his own stuffed elephant to help Leo feel better.

questions.question: How did Marcus feel after helping Leo?
choices: Sad because he lost his toy
questions.explanation: Marcus felt happy and proud because helping others made his heart feel good.

questions.question: Who helped Marcus give his elephant to Leo?
questions.explanation: Ms. Rosa, the kind zookeeper, helped Marcus safely give his stuffed elephant to Leo.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Marcus saw a ___ lion cub who had lost his favorite ___. Marcus was very ___ and gave his own toy to help Leo feel ___.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Leo the lion cub felt ___ when he hugged the stuffed elephant. Marcus felt ___ inside because helping others makes our hearts feel good.
